flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Central Community College rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.9k → $8.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
